about.hero.title: About IWS LAAYOUNE
about.hero.subtitle: Your trusted partner for digital transformation, training, and creative services in southern Morocco.
about.company.desc1: IWS LAAYOUNE is a Moroccan company specializing in digital services, professional training and creative solutions. We support businesses and individuals in their digital transformation.
about.company.title: Our History
about.company.description1: Founded in June 2021 and officially inaugurated in December 2021, IWS LAAYOUNE SARL AU was born from an ambitious vision: to democratize access to digital technologies and quality training in the southern provinces of Morocco.
about.company.description2: Based in Laayoune, our agency serves all southern regions, including Laayoune, Guelmim, Boujdour, and Dakhla. We support businesses, institutions, and individuals in their development through tailor-made solutions, combining technical expertise and creativity.
about.mission.title: Our Mission
about.mission.description: To propel our clients' success by providing them with high-performance digital tools, certified training, and close strategic support. We firmly believe that technological innovation is the engine of regional economic development.
about.values.title: Our Core Values
about.values.quality.title: Quality
about.values.quality.desc: We strive for excellence in every project, adhering to the strictest international standards.
about.values.innovation.title: Innovation
about.values.innovation.desc: We stay at the forefront of technology to offer you modern and sustainable solutions.
about.values.collaboration.title: Collaboration
about.values.collaboration.desc: We work hand in hand with our clients in a true spirit of partnership.
about.values.engagement.title: Commitment
about.values.engagement.desc: We are deeply invested in the development and success of our region.
about.expertise.title: Our Areas of Expertise
about.expertise.maintenance.title: Maintenance & Technical Support
about.expertise.maintenance.desc: Proactive assistance and preventive maintenance to ensure the continuity of your digital activities.
about.expertise.seo.title: SEO Optimization
about.expertise.seo.desc: Search engine optimization strategies to improve your visibility online.
about.expertise.marketing.title: Digital Marketing
about.expertise.marketing.desc: Targeted campaigns and social media management to increase your audience and sales.
about.expertise.design.title: Graphic Design
about.expertise.design.desc: Creation of strong visual identities and impactful communication materials.
about.expertise.web.title: Web Development
about.expertise.web.desc: Creation of custom, secure, and high-performance showcase sites, e-commerce, and web applications.
about.expertise.consulting.title: Digital Consulting
about.expertise.consulting.desc: Strategic advice to guide your digital transformation and optimize your processes.
about.why.title: Why Choose Us
about.why.p1.title: Local Expertise & Regional Understanding
about.why.p1.desc: Our roots in Laayoune give us an in-depth knowledge of the challenges and dynamics of the local and regional market.
about.why.p2.title: Passionate & Dedicated Team
about.why.p2.desc: Our experts combine technical know-how and passion to deliver results that exceed your expectations.
about.why.p3.title: Long-Term Partnership
about.why.p3.desc: We are not just service providers, but true partners committed to your sustainable growth.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.desc: Quickly find answers to your questions about our hosting services.
faq.a1: Web hosting is a service that allows you to publish a website on the Internet. It's the storage space where your site's files are located.
faq.a2: No, our team handles all the technical configuration for you if you choose our supported packs.
faq.a3: Yes, most of our packs include a free domain name for the first year.
faq.q4: Can I migrate my existing site?
faq.a4: Absolutely! We offer a free migration service to transfer your site to our servers without downtime.
faq.a5: You benefit from IWS LAAYOUNE's technical support in addition to Hostinger's official support, for fast and local assistance.
faq.q6: Can I upgrade my pack later?
faq.a6: Yes, you can upgrade your hosting pack at any time as your site grows.
legal.title: Legal Notice
legal.s1.title: Site Publisher
legal.s1.p1: The website iwslaayoune.com is published by IWS LAAYOUNE SARL AU, headquartered in Laayoune, Morocco.
legal.s2.title: Hosting
legal.s2.p1: This site is hosted by Hostinger International Ltd.
legal.s3.title: Intellectual Property
legal.s3.p1: All content on this site (texts, images, videos, etc.) is the exclusive property of IWS LAAYOUNE SARL AU.
legal.s4.title: Personal Data
legal.s4.p1: In accordance with Moroccan law 09-08 relating to the protection of individuals with regard to the processing of personal data, you have the right to access, rectify, and oppose data concerning you.
terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.s1.title: Purpose
terms.s1.p1: These general conditions aim to define the terms and conditions of use of the services offered by IWS LAAYOUNE.
terms.s2.title: Acceptance of Conditions
terms.s2.p1: The use of our services implies full and complete acceptance of these general conditions.
terms.s3.title: Services
terms.s3.p1: IWS LAAYOUNE offers web development, digital marketing, graphic design, training, and studio services.
terms.s4.title: Pricing and Payment
terms.s4.p1: The prices of our services are indicated in Moroccan Dirhams (MAD). Payment is made according to the terms defined in the quote or contract.
terms.s5.title: Liability
terms.s5.p1: IWS LAAYOUNE undertakes to implement all necessary means to ensure the proper execution of its services, within the framework of an obligation of means.
services.hero.title: Our Detailed Services
services.hero.subtitle: Discover how we can transform your business with our custom digital solutions.
services.maintenance.title: Maintenance & Technical Support
services.maintenance.short: Proactive assistance and preventive maintenance to ensure the continuity of your digital activities.
services.maintenance.details: Our maintenance service ensures your digital infrastructure remains secure, up-to-date, and high-performing. We monitor your systems 24/7 to prevent downtime before it happens.
services.maintenance.benefits: 24/7 Monitoring, Regular security updates, Responsive technical support
services.seo.title: SEO Optimization
services.seo.short: Search engine optimization strategies to improve your visibility online.
services.seo.details: We optimize your website to rank at the top of Google results. Our approach includes technical optimization, relevant content creation, and quality link building.
services.seo.benefits: Increased organic traffic, Better local ranking, Comprehensive technical audit
services.marketing.title: Digital Marketing
services.marketing.short: Targeted campaigns and social media management to increase your audience and sales.
services.marketing.details: We create and manage high-performing advertising campaigns on Google, Facebook, Instagram, and LinkedIn. We grow your community and engage your audience with captivating content.
services.marketing.benefits: Social media management, Targeted ad campaigns, ROI analysis
services.design.title: Graphic Design
services.design.short: Creation of strong visual identities and impactful communication materials.
services.design.details: Our creative team designs logos, brand guidelines, print materials, and user interfaces that reflect your brand's essence and captivate your target audience.
services.design.benefits: Logo & brand guidelines creation, UI/UX Design, Communication materials
services.web.title: Web Development
services.web.short: Creation of custom, secure, and high-performance showcase sites, e-commerce, and web applications.
services.web.details: We develop modern, fast, and responsive websites. Whether you need an elegant showcase site, a robust online store, or a complex web application, we have the technical expertise.
services.web.benefits: Showcase & E-commerce sites, Custom web applications, Responsive design
services.consulting.title: Digital Consulting
services.consulting.short: Strategic advice to guide your digital transformation and optimize your processes.
services.consulting.details: We support you in defining your digital strategy. We analyze your current processes and recommend the best tools and practices to digitize and automate your business.
services.consulting.benefits: Digital maturity audit, Transformation strategy, Technology tool selection
